title: cirsium glaberrimum
intro: Cirsium glaberrimum, also known as the smooth thistle or California thistle, is a species of thistle native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is a biennial or perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cirsium glaberrimum include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cirsium glaberrimum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
